name: forkcaster
description: Self-hosted, medication-aware nutrition coach for Umbrel. GPS ordering, GLP-1 tracking, symptom-food forecasting.

scripts.build: esbuild src/main.jsx --bundle --minify --outfile=dist/app.js --loader:.jsx=jsx --jsx=automatic --loader:.png=dataurl && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp sw.js dist/sw.js
